questions.question: 1. Sieve analysis is primarily used to determine:

answers.c: Particle size distribution of a granular sample

questions.question: 2. In a typical sieve setup, sieves are arranged:

answers.a: From coarsest on top to finest at bottom
answers.b: From finest on top to coarsest at bottom

questions.question: 3. The effectiveness of sieving depends mainly on:
4. The unit used to describe sieve fineness is generally:

answers.a: 10% of particles are finer than this size
answers.b: 50% of particles are finer than this size
answers.c: 90% of particles are finer than this size
answers.d: All particles are finer than this size
